name: Ayalon Holdings Ltd
summary: Ayalon Holdings Ltd, through its subsidiaries, provides various insurance products in Israel. It offers health insurance products, including nursing, medical expenses, surgeries and transplants, dental, personal accident, travel, and medical insurance for foreign workers insurance; liability, property, vehicle, and professional liability insurance. The company also provides savings, pension, and provident fund products. The company serves its customers through a network of agents and agencies. Ayalon Holdings Ltd was founded in 1976 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
